programme.desc: Lemmy the robot returns from Mars. Unknowingly a space squid has stowed away in his chest cavity. // Careless Alice over chlorinates the otter habitat and Marlene's fur is bleached. Her new look captivates the attention of the other zoo animals.

programme.desc: After what seems like forever, Mom and Dad have finally gotten hip to the fact that Timmy has fairy godparents. The question now is: how long can they keep Jorgen in the dark so that he won't take Wanda, Cosmo and Poof away forever?

programme.title: Fairly Odd Parents
